title: astragalus notabilis
intro: Astragalus notabilis, also known as the notabilis milkvetch, is a perennial plant species within the pea family (Fabaceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of the Tibetan Plateau. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its adaptogenic and immunomodulatory effects, which have been traditionally used to enhance the body's natural defenses against illness and stress. The health benefits of Astragalus notabilis include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as cardiovascular disease and cancer. Astragalus notabilis is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be consumed to support overall health and well-being.
